description: Analyze AlphaFold PAE matrix to identify domain boundaries in CFAP300
code:
import requests
import json
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

# Download PAE matrix for CFAP300
pae_url = "https://alphafold.ebi.ac.uk/files/AF-Q9BRQ4-F1-predicted_aligned_error_v6.json"
headers = {'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'}
response = requests.get(pae_url, headers=headers, timeout=30)
pae_data = response.json()

# Parse PAE matrix
if isinstance(pae_data, list) and len(pae_data) > 0:
    pae_entry = pae_data[0]
    pae_matrix = np.array(pae_entry.get('predicted_aligned_error', []))
    
    print(f"PAE matrix shape: {pae_matrix.shape}")
    print(f"Mean PAE: {np.mean(pae_matrix):.2f} Å")
    print(f"Median PAE: {np.median(pae_matrix):.2f} Å")
    
    # Plot PAE matrix
    fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(14, 5))
    
    # PAE heatmap
    im = axes[0].imshow(pae_matrix, cmap='Greens_r', vmin=0, vmax=30)
    axes[0].set_xlabel('Scored residue')
    axes[0].set_ylabel('Aligned residue')
    axes[0].set_title('CFAP300 Predicted Aligned Error (PAE)')
    plt.colorbar(im, ax=axes[0], label='PAE (Å)')
    
    # pLDDT plot from PDB
    pdb_url = "https://alphafold.ebi.ac.uk/files/AF-Q9BRQ4-F1-model_v6.pdb"
    response2 = requests.get(pdb_url, headers=headers, timeout=30)
    pdb_text = response2.text
    
    plddt_values = []
    residue_ids = []
    seen = set()
    for line in pdb_text.split('\n'):
        if line.startswith('ATOM') and line[12:16].strip() == 'CA':
            resid = int(line[22:26].strip())
            if resid not in seen:
                seen.add(resid)
                plddt = float(line[60:66].strip())
                plddt_values.append(plddt)
                residue_ids.append(resid)
    
    axes[1].plot(residue_ids, plddt_values, 'b-', linewidth=1.5)
    axes[1].axhline(y=90, color='green', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='Very high (≥90)')
    axes[1].axhline(y=70, color='orange', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='Confident (≥70)')
    axes[1].axhline(y=50, color='red', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='Low (≥50)')
    axes[1].set_xlabel('Residue number')
    axes[1].set_ylabel('pLDDT')
    axes[1].set_title('CFAP300 AlphaFold Confidence (pLDDT)')
    axes[1].set_ylim(0, 100)
    axes[1].legend(fontsize=8)
    axes[1].fill_between(residue_ids, 0, plddt_values, alpha=0.2, color='blue')
    
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.savefig('cfap300_alphafold_analysis.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
    plt.show()
    
    # Identify potential domain boundaries from PAE
    # Low PAE within blocks = same domain; high PAE between blocks = different domains
    block_size = 20
    n_blocks = pae_matrix.shape[0] // block_size
    print(f"\nIntra-block PAE analysis (block size={block_size}):")
    for i in range(n_blocks):
        start = i * block_size
        end = min((i + 1) * block_size, pae_matrix.shape[0])
        block_pae = pae_matrix[start:end, start:end]
        mean_pae = np.mean(block_pae)
        print(f"  Block {start+1}-{end}: mean PAE = {mean_pae:.2f} Å")
    
    # Check cross-block PAE to identify domain structure
    print(f"\nCross-block PAE (indicators of domain boundaries):")
    for i in range(n_blocks-1):
        for j in range(i+1, n_blocks):
            s1, e1 = i*block_size, (i+1)*block_size
            s2, e2 = j*block_size, min((j+1)*block_size, pae_matrix.shape[0])
            cross_pae = np.mean(pae_matrix[s1:e1, s2:e2])
            if cross_pae > 10:
                print(f"  Blocks {s1+1}-{e1} vs {s2+1}-{e2}: mean PAE = {cross_pae:.1f} Å (possible domain boundary)")

else:
    print("Could not parse PAE data")
    print(str(pae_data)[:500])
